message:
feat(runtime): add RegionTable and ObligationTable implementations

Add the table wrapper implementations for RegionRecord and ObligationRecord
arenas, completing the set of table abstractions for the sharding refactor.

New files:
- region_table.rs: RegionTable wrapping Arena<RegionRecord>
- obligation_table.rs: ObligationTable wrapping Arena<ObligationRecord>

Each table provides typed accessors (get, get_mut, insert, remove, iter, len,
is_empty) that delegate to the inner arena while allowing table-level locking
to be introduced later without changing call sites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
